statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); git_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); git_info=''; [ -n "$git_branch" ] && git_info=$(printf " on \033[35m%s\033[0m" "$git_branch"); ctx_info=''; [ -n "$remaining" ] && ctx_info=$(printf " [\033[36m%s%%\033[0m]" "$remaining"); printf "\033[32m%s@%s\033[0m in \033[34m%s\033[0m%s%s" "$user" "$host" "$cwd" "$git_info" "$ctx_info"
